summary: Video titled 'Christmas After Mass Deportations' / 'MIRTHNUKE' with fast cuts. It shows color graded shots (a man at a window over a glowing city skyline, Santa Claus, a figure in sunglasses in a red beret and a green and red uniform, candlelit Christmas scenes) and a CGI shot of an explosion blooming over a night-lit Earth, with green glowing gothic title text and snowflake effects throughout.

script.scene: Profile of a man in silhouette against a glowing golden city skyline seen through a window; green glowing gothic title text 'Christmas After Mass Deportations' overlaid.
Red and white close-up of a Santa Claus figure with green-tinted lighting; the 'Christmas After Mass Deportations' title text held on screen.
Close-up of a figure in sunglasses wearing a red beret and a green and red uniform with a candy-cane tie; shallow focus, title text remains.
Dark, candlelit outdoor Christmas scene with string lights on a house and figures moving, in deep green tones; gothic title text glowing at center.
CGI shot of a colorful confetti and snow explosion blooming over a night-lit planet Earth amid falling snowflakes; large green glowing gothic title 'MIRTHNUKE' across the globe.

notable_text: This Christmas, our hearts grow as our illegal population shrinks.
